mechanisms.name: DELUXE HERO’S HANDBOOK / UNDER THE HOOD: CHARACTER EXPERTISE VS. PLAYER EXPERTISE

steps.label: Expertise skills measure what your character knows about various things, whether you know anything about them or not. It’s fairly easy to measure what a hero knows by making the appropriate skill check or looking at the routine check value
